name: CA.RO ZAP - Motor de Atendimento (Evolution + OpenAI + Claude)

parameters.query: select * from tenants where evolution_instance = '{{ $json.instance }}' and status = 'active' limit 1;

parameters.jsCode:
const t = $json.msgText || '';
return [{ json: { msgText: t, msgText_esc: String(t).replace(/'/g,"''"), msgType: $('Normalizar Payload').item.json.msgType, mediaUrl: '' } }];

parameters.query: insert into contacts (tenant_id, name, phone, last_message_at) values ('{{ $('Buscar Tenant').item.json.id }}', '{{ $('Normalizar Payload').item.json.pushName_esc }}', '{{ $('Normalizar Payload').item.json.phone_esc }}', now()) on conflict (tenant_id, phone) do update set last_message_at = now(), name = case when contacts.name = '' then excluded.name else contacts.name end returning *;

insert into messages (tenant_id, contact_id, sender, body, type) values ('{{ $('Buscar Tenant').item.json.id }}', '{{ $('Upsert Contato').item.json.id }}', 'customer', '{{ $('Consolidar Mensagem').item.json.msgText_esc }}', '{{ $('Consolidar Mensagem').item.json.msgType }}') returning *;

select coalesce(json_agg(json_build_object('sender', sender, 'body', body) order by created_at), '[]'::json) as history from ( select sender, body, created_at from messages where contact_id = '{{ $('Upsert Contato').item.json.id }}' order by created_at desc limit 8 ) sub;

update contacts set lead_score = '{{ $json.lead_score }}', lead_reason = '{{ $json.lead_reason }}', pipeline_stage = '{{ $json.pipeline_stage }}', tags = '{{ $json.tags_json }}'::jsonb, custom_fields = '{{ $json.custom_json }}'::jsonb, ai_auto_reply = {{ $json.ai_auto_reply }}, last_message_at = now() where id = '{{ $('Upsert Contato').item.json.id }}' returning *;

insert into messages (tenant_id, contact_id, sender, body, type) values ('{{ $('Buscar Tenant').item.json.id }}', '{{ $('Upsert Contato').item.json.id }}', 'ai', '{{ $('Consolidar IA').item.json.replyText_esc }}', 'text') returning *;

insert into notes (tenant_id, contact_id, body, author) values ('{{ $('Buscar Tenant').item.json.id }}', '{{ $('Upsert Contato').item.json.id }}', 'Transferido automaticamente da IA para atendimento humano. Motivo: {{ $('Consolidar IA').item.json.lead_reason }}', 'Sistema CA.RO ZAP') returning *;
